title: Phase workers implement design explore
purpose: B2.3 defines phase workers implement design explore for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack.
scope: Owns `B2.3` only; siblings under `B2` must not duplicate this spec.
Aligns with minimal HITL: H1 plan, H2 blocker, H3 sign-off ([INTRO-1.2](INTRO-1.2-human-touchpoint-contract-h1-h2-h3.md)).
Conflicts resolve in favor of [Vision §4 — Branch B — Cognition & routing plane](../../full-automation-vision-and-hierarchy.md#4-branch-b-cognition-routing-plane).
behavior_steps: From `next_action`, the conductor spawns one phase worker type per turn—implement-feature, dd-writer, librarian explore, refactor—each under a task card or skill contract with evidence requirements and no journal writes.
Parallel phase workers run only when the integration manifest declares independent lanes; otherwise one worker per turn preserves auditability and avoids conflicting dual-write.
Workers execute the scoped phase, return summaries and evidence paths, and must not choose the next pipeline step or update `journal/state.json` themselves.
The conductor verifies worker output against task card acceptance criteria before marking phase progress or spawning [B2.4](B2.4-verifier-tool-operator-evidence.md) for command proof.
If a worker expands beyond `allowed_reads`, omits required evidence, or attempts journal writes, pursuit blocks at H2 until the conductor rescopes or respawns under a corrected contract.

narrative: B2.3 defines phase workers implement design explore for the agent-driven expert system. Cognition & routing — [S0](B1.1-s0-deterministic-mandatory-first.md)–S4, conductor, workers, dual-stack. In practice, the system from `next_action`, the conductor spawns one phase worker type per turn—implement-feature, dd-writer, librarian explore, refactor—each under a task card or skill contract with evidence requirements and no journal writes, then parallel phase workers run only when the integration manifest declares independent lanes; otherwise one worker per turn preserves auditability and avoids conflicting dual-write.
reader_narrative:
<!-- prose-source: agent plane-b 2026-06-28 -->

Phase workers implement one skill phase under contract: implement-feature, dd-writer, explore, refactor—each with task card paths, evidence requirements, and no journal writes. The conductor selects the worker type from `next_action` and route-tier output.

Parallel phase workers are allowed only when the integration manifest declares independent lanes; otherwise one worker per turn preserves auditability. Workers return summaries; the conductor merges and verifies before marking progress.
